title: 慎入！男跳1600度煉鋼爐　全身熔化慘死

replies.msg:
男子跳進1600度的煉鋼爐內自殺身亡！
據土耳其《takvim》報導，2018年12月23日，位於薩姆松省的一間鋼鐵廠，擔任清潔工人的34歲男子阿德姆(Adem A.)跳進了1600度高溫的煉鋼爐中身亡，該段過程全被監視器給拍下，事發後廠方停止作業，待鍋爐冷卻後，嘗試從中將阿德姆僅剩的骨頭取出。
據悉，阿德姆7年前開始在該間鋼鐵廠工作，當天上班約30分鐘後，他就被監視器拍到跳入煉鋼爐。（即時新聞中心／綜合報導）

https://tw.news.appledaily.com/international/realtime/20190106/1495587

有機會一跳入去已經窒息死

I am the bone of my sword
Steel is my body and fire is my blood
I have created over a thousand blades
Unknown to Death,
Nor known to Life.
Have withstood pain to create many weapons
Yet, those hands will never hold anything
So as I pray, Unlimited Blade Works.

My body is made out of swords.
My blood is of iron and my heart of glass.
I have overcome countless battlefields.
Not even once retreating,
Not even once being understood.
He was always alone, intoxicated with victory in a hill of swords.
Thus, his life has no meaning.
That body was certainly made out of swords.
34 歲做清潔
